summary: Iteration 80 - Testing 'Photos Included in Buy-in' control for On-Demand sessions. All 7 features verified PASS across backend APIs and frontend UI.

gallery_pricing_card_shows_included_in_b.location: Gallery Page - Gallery Pricing Card - On-Demand column
gallery_pricing_card_shows_included_in_b.verified_row: Included in Buy-in row shows '3 photos' for On-Demand column

gallery_pricing_modal_has_on_demand_phot.verified_section: On-Demand Photo Pricing section with 'Photos Included in On-Demand Buy-In' input

on_demand_settings_page_has_photos_inclu.verified_element: Slider labeled 'Photos Included in Buy-In' with range 0-20
on_demand_settings_page_has_photos_inclu.description_text: Number of photos included free with on-demand session buy-in. Additional photos charged per resolution tier.

critical_code_review_comments: on_demand_photos_included column correctly added to profiles table (models.py line 133)
UpdateGalleryPricingRequest and OnDemandSettingsRequest both include on_demand_photos_included field (photographer.py lines 284, 1531)
Both GET and POST/PUT endpoints correctly read/write the field (photographer.py lines 268, 325, 1574, 1603)
GalleryPage.js correctly displays 'Included in Buy-in' for both Live Session AND On-Demand columns (lines 522-524, 548-550)
OnDemandSettingsPage.js has slider for Photos Included in Buy-In with state onDemandPhotosIncluded (line 39, 399-420)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The on_demand_photos_included field is fully integrated across both Gallery Pricing API and On-Demand Settings API. Both APIs read/write to the same database column (profiles.on_demand_photos_included). The UI displays this in 3 places: Gallery Pricing Card (On-Demand column), Gallery Pricing Modal (On-Demand section), and On-Demand Settings Page (slider).
